ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index of the individual */,
  "children" INTEGER /* Number of children the individual has */,
  "smoker" TEXT /* Smoking status of the individual */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the individual resides */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the individual in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the individual in kilograms */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the individual */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the individual's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the individual's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of the region */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the health metric (e.g., blood pressure, cholesterol) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the health metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the health metric */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the health metric data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual the demographic information belongs to */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individual */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the individual */,
  "income" REAL /* Income level of the individual */,
  "religion" TEXT /* Religious affiliation of the individual */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken by the individual */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifestyle" (
  "lifestyle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifestyle record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual the lifestyle information belongs to */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Dietary habits of the individual */,
  "exercise" TEXT /* Exercise habits of the individual */,
  "sleep" INTEGER /* Average sleep duration of the individual */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Frequency of alcohol consumption */,
  "stress_level" TEXT /* Self-reported stress level */,
  "mental_health" TEXT /* Self-reported mental health status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifestyle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifestyle_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual the medical history belongs to */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Medical condition diagnosed */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition was diagnosed */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment or medication prescribed */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of medical conditions */,
  "current_medications" TEXT /* Current medications the individual is taking */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies the individual has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance" (
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual the insurance information belongs to */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "plan_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance plan */,
  "coverage" REAL /* Coverage percentage */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Unique policy number provided by the insurance provider */,
  "coverage_plan_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the insurance coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pharmacy" (
  "pharmacy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pharmacy record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual the pharmacy information belongs to */,
  "pharmacy_name" TEXT /* Name of the pharmacy */,
  "medication" TEXT /* Medication prescribed */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date when the prescription was filled */,
  "prescription_duration" TEXT /* Duration for which the medication is prescribed */,
  "refills_remaining" INTEGER /* Number of refills remaining for the prescription */,
  "filled_by" TEXT /* Name of the pharmacist who filled the prescription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pharmacy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pharmacy_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the provider */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the provider */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the healthcare provider */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the provider has */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the provider based on patient feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual the appointment is for */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider the appointment is with */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the appointment */,
  "appointment_status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the appointment */,
  "appointment_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the appointment in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., provider, researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual whose record is accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the record */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)
